artifacts.summary: Comprehensive analysis of BFMCS construction over TimelineQuot. Identified singleton BFMCS modal_backward blocker. Proposed multi-family architecture using ClosedFlagBundle pattern with DenseTask integration.

partial_progress.details: Analyzed codebase (BFMCS, FMCS, TimelineQuotCanonical, DenseTaskRelation, ClosedFlagBundle). Documented singleton blocker and multi-family solution.

key_findings.blocker: Singleton BFMCS fails modal_backward - Diamond(psi) in M does not imply psi in M
implementation_phases: Phase 2: Build ClosedFamily BFMCS via transfinite closure
Phase 3: Prove modal coherence via saturated_modal_backward
Phase 5: Wire to truth lemma via DenseTask
